originalDescription: Initialize shadcn/ui component library on top of the existing Tailwind 4 setup. Run `npx shadcn-ui@latest init` in apps/admin, configure components.json with the correct paths. Add base components: Button, Card, Dialog, Input, Label, Badge, Separator. Ensure Storybook stories are updated to showcase new components. Requires Tailwind CSS (already installed at 4.1.8).
sanitizedDescription: Initialize shadcn/ui component library on top of the existing Tailwind 4 setup. Run `npx shadcn-ui@latest init` in apps/admin, configure components.json with the correct paths. Add base components: Button, Card, Dialog, Input, Label, Badge, Separator. Ensure Storybook stories are updated to showcase new components. Requires Tailwind CSS (already installed at 4.1.8).
